mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS revenue, IFNULL(SUM(total_cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount - total_cost), 0) AS profit, COUNT(id) AS orderCount FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{startTime} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(id) AS value FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT o.id AS id, o.order_time AS orderTime, u.username AS username, o.address AS address, o.dish_name AS dishName, o.quantity AS quantity, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status AS status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY o.order_time DESC

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(id) AS orderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN total_cost > 0 THEN (total_amount - total_cost) ELSE (total_amount * 0.4) END) AS profit FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{startTime}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, #{dateFormat}) AS date, SUM(total_amount) AS value FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, #{dateFormat}) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(id) AS orderCount FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{today}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%m-%d') AS date, SUM(total_amount) AS value FROM orders WHERE order_time >= #{sevenDaysAgo} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(order_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY order_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
